# Google tag gateway for advertisers

Add a layer of data security and privacy controls when using Google Tag Manager

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/google-tag-gateway/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).
>
> Use [Google tag gateway for advertisers llms-full.txt](https://developers.cloudflare.com/google-tag-gateway/llms-full.txt) for the complete Google tag gateway for advertisers documentation in a single file, intended for offline indexing, bulk vectorization, or large-context models.

## Google tag gateway for advertisers documentation pages

- [Google tag gateway for advertisers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/google-tag-gateway/index.md): Deploy Google measurement tags from your domain for improved ad signal recovery.
